title: Cobblemon Triple Bakalutions
description: A Cobblemon Addon that adds three new Eeveelutions themed around Hatsune Miku, Kasane Teto, and Akita Neru!
body:
# Triple Baka Eeveelutions!

![Left to Right: Nerueon, Mikueon, Teteon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed16844c8a42e8663b34cf28e616d4da00be5596.jpeg)

## Discover three new Eeveelutions!

This addon adds three new Eeveelutions themed around Hatsune Miku, Kasane Teto, and Akita Neru, created by artists [EefHere (me)](https://www.instagram.com/eef.here/) and [Tubz_AZ](https://www.instagram.com/tubz_az/).

- Give an Eevee a **Medicinal Leek** to evolve it into Mikueon!
- Give an Eevee a **Bread** to evolve it into Tetoeon!
- Give an Eevee a **Shell Bell** to evolve it into Nerueon!

--------

[Original Source](https://www.instagram.com/p/DHBsloIPLjL/?img_index=1)

--------

**This addon is still a work in progress! Proper animations, bug fixes, and such are planned in the future! Updates will come every so often and we thank you for your patience!**

## Eeveelution Info, Stats, Etc:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

### MIKUEON
**The Vocaloid PKMN - Normal Type**

![Mikueon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/184b80243fbf2a98127338ae9a2ab219749cb7f4_0.webp)

**Stats: HP: 95, Atk: 60, Def: 130, Sp.Atk: 65, Sp.Def: 110, Speed: 65, Total: 525**

--------

### TETOEON
**The Twindrill PKMN - Normal Type**

![Tetoeon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76be4e97eb8cd2a5125c0828f78cce82fb997ee6_0.webp)

**Stats: HP: 60, Atk: 110, Def: 65, Sp.Atk: 130, Sp.Def: 65, Speed: 95, Total: 525**

--------

### NERUEON
**The Yellow One PKMN - Normal Type**

![Nerueon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e862227a844479de5080de27af5748c9881cbd2.png)

**Stats: HP: 95, Atk: 130, Def: 65, Sp.Atk: 110, Sp.Def: 60, Speed: 65, Total: 525**

--------

**For more info on all three (movesets, abilities, spawnrates, etc) click** [HERE](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1WaomV1lCEQUBHqZNoJLf4x_YA1vQfYrGjwF-2bjKi-o/edit?gid=0#gid=0)

</details>

## Q&A on usage and other stuff:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Feel free to ask other questions/help in this addons post in the official Cobblemon Discord Server!**

**Q** : Will this addon be updated to include other Eeveelutions themed around other popular vocaloid characters?
**A** : Most likely not, this addon was made specifically around these three due to their popularity and connection. 

**Q** : What are their shiny inspirations?
**A** : Mikueon: Sakura Miku, Teteon: SynthV Teto, Nerueon: Yowane Haku

**Q** : Can I add this addon into a modpack?
**A** : Sure! As long as nothing major is changed and you just want these three silly mons in your world then go for it, as long as **no monetary gain is involved** with the modpack and such.

**Q** : Can I use this addon in videos like Youtube, TikTok, Shorts, etc?
**A** : Absolutely! Please just credit the mod somewhere or provide the Modrinth link.

**Q** : Can I add this addon in public servers?
**A** : **There shouldn't be an issue as long as NO MONETARY GAIN is involved with these three. Please do not put these in loot crates/boxes or behind any paywall.

</details>

## How to Install:

Make sure you have the base Cobblemon in the modpack you plan to use. First, download the .zip file and open your modpacks folder and place the .zip file in the “resourcepacks” folder. Then, boot up Minecraft and select the world you plan to play on. Open the world’s folder and download the .zip file again, and place it in the “datapacks” folder of your world’s folder. 

--------
